subject: [PATCH v6 13/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_SET_MODE for runtime sync/async toggle

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds a new ioctl, UFFDIO_SET_MODE, to toggle the async mode of userfaultfd at runtime without re-registering the userfaultfd. This allows virtual machine monitors (VMMs) to switch between sync and async read-write protection (RWP) modes on-the-fly for tasks such as working set scanning and page eviction. The ioctl takes an enable/disable bitmask of UFFD_FEATURE_* flags, with only RWP_ASYNC toggleable today. When switching to async mode, pending sync waiters are woken up so they can retry and auto-resolve under the new mode. This patch also includes changes to userfaultfd_show_fdinfo() to handle the lockless observer case.
